languages.text: "Традиция полка, Ваша Светлость. Чтобы принять командование, нужно сразить действующего командира. А это Иждриг".
"Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To take command, one must best the existing commander in combat. And that man is Izdrig."
languages.original_text: "Традиция полка, Ваша Светлость. Чтобы принять командование, нужно сразить действующего командира. А это Иждриг".

traits.locale_text: "Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To claim the right of command, one must best the standing commander in combat. That man is Izdrig."
"Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To take command, one must best the existing commander in combat. And that man is Izdrig."
"Commissar words, Izdrig! How many more soldiers will we lose? To starvation, to attacks, to the maddening screeching?"
"Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To claim the right of command, one must best the standing commander in combat. That man is Izdrig."
"Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To take command, one must best the existing commander in combat. And that man is Izdrig."
"Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To take command, one must best the existing commander in combat. And that man is Izdrig."

languages.text: 「イズドリーグ、コミッサーの言葉だ。兵士を何人失うのか。飢えに、攻撃に、狂気の叫びに？」
languages.original_text: "Commissar words, Izdrig! How many more soldiers will we lose? To starvation, to attacks, to the maddening screeching?"

traits.locale_text: 「イズドリーグ、 commissar の言葉だ。兵士を何人失うのか。飢えに、攻撃に、狂気の叫びに？」

languages.text: "Regimentstradition, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!" Um das Kommando zu übernehmen, muss man den aktuellen Commander im Kampf schlagen. Und dieser Mann ist Izdrig."
languages.original_text: "Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To take command, one must best the existing commander in combat. And that man is Izdrig."

traits.locale_text: "Regimentstradition, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!" Um das Kommando zu übernehmen, muss man den aktuellen Commander im Kampf schlagen. Und dieser Mann ist Izdrig."

languages.text: « Une tradition de notre régiment, Votre Seigneurie. Pour prendre le commandement, il convient d'abord de vaincre le commandant en poste. Izdrig, en l'occurrence. »
languages.original_text: "Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To take command, one must best the existing commander in combat. And that man is Izdrig."

traits.locale_text: « Une tradition de notre régiment, Votre Seigneurie. Pour prendre le commandement, il convient d'abord de vaincre le commandant en poste. Izdrig, en l'occurrence. »

languages.text: «Es la tradición del regimiento, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Para asumir el mando, debe derrotar al comandante actual en combate. Y ese es Izdrig».
languages.original_text: "Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To take command, one must best the existing commander in combat. And that man is Izdrig."

traits.locale_text: «Es la tradición del regimiento, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Para asumir el mando, debe derrotar al comandante actual en combate. Y ese es Izdrig».

languages.text: "Alay geleneği {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Komutayı almak için mevcut komutanı dövüşte alt etmek gerekir. Mevcut komutanımız da İzdrig."
languages.original_text: "Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To take command, one must best the existing commander in combat. And that man is Izdrig."

traits.locale_text: "Alay geleneği {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Komutayı almak için mevcut komutanı dövüşte alt etmek gerekir. Mevcut komutanımız da İzdrig."

languages.text: “这是军团的传统，舰长大人。要取得指挥权，就必须在战斗中击败现任指挥官。而那个人就是伊兹德里格。”
languages.original_text: "Regimental tradition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To take command, one must best the existing commander in combat. And that man is Izdrig."

traits.locale_text: “这是军团的传统，舰长大人。要取得指挥权，就必须在战斗中击败现任指挥官。而那个人就是伊兹德里格。”
